authorization: user said proceed after Step 5g preregistration commit

db_type_checks.cmd: docker exec memibrium-ruvector-db psql -U memory -d memory -tA -F '|' -c "SELECT 'embedding_type|' || data_type || ':' || udt_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='memories' AND column_name='embedding'; SELECT 'ruvector_type_count|' || count(*) FROM pg_type WHERE typname='ruvector'; SELECT 'vector_type_count|' || count(*) FROM pg_type WHERE typname='vector';"

docker_ps.output:
memibrium-server|Up 4 hours (healthy)|memibrium-memibrium
memibrium-ollama|Up 2 days|ollama/ollama:latest
memibrium-ruvector-db|Up 2 days (healthy)|ruvnet/ruvector-postgres:latest

linked_counts.cmd: docker exec memibrium-ruvector-db psql -U memory -d memory -tA -c "WITH locomo AS (SELECT id FROM memories WHERE domain LIKE 'locomo-%') SELECT 'temporal_expressions|' || count(*) FROM temporal_expressions WHERE memory_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'memory_snapshots|' || count(*) FROM memory_snapshots WHERE memory_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'user_feedback|' || count(*) FROM user_feedback WHERE memory_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'contradictions|' || count(*) FROM contradictions WHERE memory_a_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) OR memory_b_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'memory_edges|' || count(*) FROM memory_edges WHERE source_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) OR target_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo);"

live_hybrid_source_probe.cmd: docker exec memibrium-server python3 -c 'from pathlib import Path; p=Path("/app/hybrid_retrieval.py").read_text(); print("dynamic_self_vtype=" + str("$1::{self.vtype}" in p)); print("hardcoded_vector=" + str("$1::vector" in p));'

live_server_decimal_probe.cmd: docker exec memibrium-server python3 -c 'from pathlib import Path; p=Path("/app/server.py").read_text(); print("serialize_result=" + str("def _serialize_result" in p)); print("decimal_import=" + str("Decimal" in p)); print("decimal_handling=" + str("isinstance(value, Decimal)" in p or "Decimal)" in p));'

locomo_count.cmd: docker exec memibrium-ruvector-db psql -U memory -d memory -tA -c "SELECT count(id) FROM memories WHERE domain LIKE 'locomo-%';"

server_env_relevant.cmd: docker exec memibrium-server sh -lc 'env | grep -E "^(USE_RUVECTOR|EMBEDDING_MODEL|AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT|AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT|AZURE_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT|OPENAI_MODEL|OPENAI_BASE_URL|AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT|AZURE_EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT)=" | sort'
